string.name: whats_new_content
string.translation_description: HTML content listing new features in this release, shown in the What's new dialog and appended to the Help screen. Please do not change the < and > markup.

resources.string:
Welcome to Sky Map

New users are greeted with a guided onboarding experience that checks your device sensors and gets you stargazing quickly.

Better Location

Location handling has been completely redesigned — clearer status messages, a progress indicator while your position is resolving, and fixes for many long-standing bugs. There\'s also a new map to help you confirm your location visually.

Search

You can now search by RA and Dec coordinates as well as by object name. The search overlay also updates to show "Found: X" when your target drifts into the centre of the screen.
